imageCaption: Paghingi ng ayuda sa oras ng kailangan
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a Filipino person calling for help in a safe, non-graphic emergency situation, with another person approaching to assist. Clear daylight, respectful composition.

imageCaption: Biglaang pangyayaring kailangan ng agarang aksyon
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of an emergency sign or emergency button in a public place. Clear details, bright lighting, serious but calm safety context.

imageCaption: Taong tumutulong sa seguridad at batas
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a Filipino police officer helping a citizen in a public area. Respectful, calm scene, bright daylight, clear details.
A realistic photograph of Filipino firefighters standing near a fire truck, ready to help. Non-graphic, calm emergency response scene, clear details.

imageCaption: Lugar para sa gamutan at agarang lunas
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a hospital entrance in the Philippines with clear signage and calm people nearby. Bright daylight, clean and safe scene.

imageCaption: Sasakyang nagdadala ng may sakit o nasugatan
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of an ambulance parked outside a hospital or on a safe roadside, with emergency lights visible but no graphic injury. Clear daylight, respectful scene.
A realistic photograph of a person waving for help from a safe location during a non-graphic emergency situation. Clear daylight, serious but respectful scene.
A realistic photograph of a minor roadside accident scene with safety cones and responders nearby, no visible injuries, no graphic content. Clear daylight, calm safety context.
A realistic photograph of firefighters responding to smoke from a building at a safe distance, no visible injuries, non-graphic. Serious emergency scene, clear details.

imageCaption: Mataas na tubig sa daan o bahay
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a flooded street in the Philippines with people safely walking on higher ground. No danger close-up, respectful disaster context, cloudy daylight.
A realistic photograph of people calmly practicing an earthquake drill under sturdy tables in a classroom or office. Clear safety context, no damage or injuries.
A realistic photograph of heavy rain and strong wind outside a safe home window in the Philippines. Non-graphic, clear weather emergency context.

imageCaption: Tubig na bumabagsak mula sa langit
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of rain falling on a street in the Philippines, with people using umbrellas safely. Clear details, calm rainy day scene.

imageCaption: Malakas na ihip na maaaring delikado
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of trees bending in strong wind during bad weather, seen from a safe distance. Non-graphic, clear weather safety scene.
A realistic photograph of a warning sign in a public place, clearly visible and easy to understand. Bright lighting, safety-focused composition.
A realistic photograph of a person carefully walking on a wet sidewalk while holding a handrail. Clear details, everyday safety context.
A realistic photograph of a blocked unsafe area with caution tape and warning signs. No injuries, clear safety context, bright daylight.
A realistic photograph of people gathered calmly in a safe evacuation area or open space. Bright daylight, reassuring safety context.

imageCaption: Lugar sa labas ng bahay o gusali
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of people calmly exiting a building toward an open safe area during a drill. Clear daylight, non-graphic safety scene.
A realistic photograph of a clearly marked exit sign above a doorway in a public building. Clean interior, bright lighting, safety-focused composition.
A realistic photograph of labeled medicine bottles and tablets on a clean table, with no specific brand names. Bright lighting, clear health safety context.

imageCaption: Bahaging nasaktan o napunit ang balat
imagePrompt: A realistic non-graphic photograph of a small bandage on a person's arm or hand, suggesting a minor wound. Clean, respectful, medical safety context.
A realistic non-graphic medical photograph showing a small drop of blood on a clean gauze pad, with first aid supplies nearby. Respectful, minimal, educational context.
A realistic photograph of a thermometer being used to check a person's temperature at home. Clear details, caring health context, soft lighting.

imageCaption: Pag-ubo dahil sa iritasyon o sakit
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a person covering their mouth with tissue while coughing, in a respectful health safety context. Clean indoor setting, soft lighting.

imageCaption: Pakiramdam na may masama sa katawan
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a person holding their stomach or head gently, showing discomfort without distress. Clean home setting, respectful health context.
A realistic photograph of a person sitting down safely while feeling dizzy, with another person nearby to help. Clean indoor setting, respectful health context.

imageCaption: Unang tulong bago makarating sa doktor
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of a first aid kit opened on a clean table with bandages, gauze, and basic supplies. Bright lighting, clear educational safety context.
A realistic close-up photograph of a smartphone screen showing an emergency hotline contact page, with fictional numbers only. Clean modern UI, serious safety context.

imageCaption: Paglipat sa mas ligtas na lugar
imagePrompt: A realistic photograph of people calmly entering an evacuation center or safe area, assisted by volunteers. Non-graphic, respectful disaster preparedness scene.
